headline: Hasbro (HAS) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
summary: In the latest trading session, Hasbro (HAS) closed at $91.63, marking a -1.77% move from the previous day.

headline: A Labubu movie is on its way as Pop Mart expands the iconic toy franchise
summary: Labubu is set to hit the big screen in a deal with Sony Pictures.

headline: 188-year-old NYC pharmacy has been 'packed like sardines'—all because of $40 headbands and FX's 'Love Story'
summary: Twenty-somethings are flocking to a nearly 200-year-old pharmacy in New York to buy headbands once worn by Carolyn Bessette Kennedy, the drugstore's owners say.
